name: Zerodha Real-Time Trading Analytics — Kafka Streams
scenario: Build a real-time analytics service for the Zerodha trading platform using Kafka Streams. Consumes 'trade-executed' events and produces: live trade counts per symbol, 5-minute rolling volume, large trade alerts, and a fraud detection stream for rapid-fire accounts.
description: Kafka Streams analytics topology with 4 output branches. TopologyTestDriver tests for each branch. Simulates the real-time analytics that power trading dashboards.

core.description: @EnableKafkaStreams + spring.kafka.streams.application-id configured. StreamsBuilder @Bean defines the full topology.

Branch 1: filter large trades (totalValue > ₹1,00,000) → 'large-trades'. Branch 2: running count per symbol → 'symbol-count' (Long). Branch 3: 5-min tumbling volume per symbol → 'symbol-5min-volume' (Double). Branch 4: flag symbols with > 10 trades in any 5-min window → 'high-frequency-alerts'.
All branches re-key by symbol using .selectKey((k, e) -> e.symbol()) before grouping.

TopologyTestDriver tests (4): (1) large trades filtered correctly, (2) TCS count = N after N trades, (3) 5-min volume accumulates correctly, (4) high-frequency alert fires when count > 10. All 4 pass.
Use Materialized.as('store-name') for all aggregations to enable named state stores.

bonus.description: Add a KStream-KTable join: join 'trade-executed' with 'stock-info' KTable to produce enriched trades (symbol, companyName, sector, qty, total). TopologyTestDriver test with both input topics piped.

Add hopping window (size=5min, advance=1min) for rolling volume. Show the difference in output frequency vs tumbling window. TopologyTestDriver test: pipe events across two windows, verify rolling window emits more records.
Add a state store query endpoint: @GetMapping('/analytics/volume/{symbol}') that reads from the Kafka Streams state store directly (ReadOnlyKeyValueStore) without consuming from an output topic.

data_to_use:
Test trades for TopologyTestDriver:
TCS BUY 10 @ ₹3890 = ₹38,900 (medium)
TCS BUY 30 @ ₹3890 = ₹1,16,700 (large)
INFY SELL 100 @ ₹1560 = ₹1,56,000 (large)
RELIANCE BUY 2 @ ₹2450 = ₹4,900 (small)

High-frequency test: pipe 12 trades for 'UNKNOWN-CARD' in same window → alert fires

Expected outputs:
large-trades: TCS-large, INFY (2 records)
symbol-count: TCS=2, INFY=1, RELIANCE=1
symbol-5min-volume: TCS=₹1,55,600, INFY=₹1,56,000, RELIANCE=₹4,900
example_output:
# trade-executed events:
[TCS, BUY 10@3890=₹38,900]
[TCS, BUY 30@3890=₹1,16,700] ← large!
[INFY, SELL 100@1560=₹1,56,000] ← large!

# large-trades output:
TCS  → {symbol:TCS, qty:30, totalValue:116700}
INFY → {symbol:INFY, qty:100, totalValue:156000}

# symbol-count output:
TCS  → 1, TCS → 2 (updates)
INFY → 1

# symbol-5min-volume output:
TCS  → 38900.0 (after T1), TCS → 155600.0 (after T2)
INFY → 156000.0

# TopologyTestDriver tests:
✓ largeTrades_filteredCorrectly
✓ symbolCount_accumulatesCorrectly
✓ symbolVolume_sumsCorrectly
✓ highFrequency_alertFires
ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. @EnableKafkaStreams required on @Configuration. TopologyTestDriver: set APPLICATION_ID_CONFIG and BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG to any dummy value. selectKey() before groupByKey() for symbol-based grouping. Windowed count: .map((windowed, count) -> KeyValue.pair(windowed.key(), count)) to extract plain String key. Materialized.<String, Double, KeyValueStore<Bytes, byte[]>>as('name').withValueSerde(Serdes.Double()) for typed state stores.
submission_instructions: GitHub push. All 4 TopologyTestDriver tests pass. README explains each of the 4 output streams and what they represent.
tips_for_success: Build the topology in a @Configuration class, NOT in a @Service — Spring Kafka needs the @Bean to register it
selectKey() re-keys: causes repartition (internal topic created); key changes to symbol
TopologyTestDriver props: APPLICATION_ID + BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS must be set (any dummy string)
Windowed key: Windowed<String> — use windowed.key() to get the plain symbol
readKeyValuesToMap(): gets last value per key — correct for KTable-derived output
concepts_reinforced: KStream.filter + mapValues + to for basic transformations
selectKey before groupByKey for symbol-based aggregation
count() and aggregate() with Materialized state stores
TopologyTestDriver for synchronous, in-process Streams testing
